name.description: Defines the name of the API Gateway request validator, which must be unique within the API Gateway.

rest_api_id.description: ID of the associated REST API, required for linking the request validator to the correct API Gateway.

validate_request_body.description: Determines whether the request body should be validated against the API's schema. Set to true to enable validation.

validate_request_parameters.description: Specifies whether to validate request parameters in API Gateway. Set to true to enable validation.
